subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Kinney home in New York, 1912-04-11
subcodes.first_line: How are you? You are welcome. After arriving today, although tired, still I had the utmost longing and yearning to see you
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @suffering and imprisonment
